columns.name: Kornhandler
columns.description: The unique code for the grain merchant

columns.name: Avregningstype
columns.description: The type of adjustment or correction

columns.name: Fradato
columns.description: The date from which the adjustment is effective

columns.name: Art
columns.description: The category code for the product or adjustment

columns.name: Sort
columns.description: The sequence number of the item in a series

columns.name: AvvikSpirireposFra
columns.description: Deviation from the basic springing, start percentage

columns.name: AvvikSpirireposTil
columns.description: Deviation from the basic springing, end percentage

columns.name: Prosent
columns.description: The additional or subtractive percentage to the base price

columns.name: Brukerid
columns.description: The unique identifier for the user performing the adjustment

columns.name: Tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp of when the record was created or last updated
